flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Loyola University Chicago rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($47.8k → $53.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Loyola University Chicago rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($47.8k → $53.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Loyola University Chicago fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
